name: Paper2Any REST API
description: Convert PDF/text/topics into PPTX, draw.io, SVG figures, posters, and video scripts via the Paper2Any FastAPI server.
_setup: 1. Clone and start Paper2Any: docker run -p 8000:8000 paper2any  (or: uvicorn fastapi_app.main:app --port 8000)
2. Set PAPER2ANY_BASE_URL secret: secret:set key=PAPER2ANY_BASE_URL value=http://localhost:8000/api/v1
3. Set LLM credentials inside Paper2Any via its .env (DF_API_KEY, DF_MODEL)

paper2ppt.description: Convert a PDF paper or topic text into an editable PPTX slide deck.

input_type.description: pdf = file upload; text = raw text body; topic = short topic string

content.description: File path (pdf), raw text, or topic string depending on input_type

language.description: Output language code (ja, en, zh, etc.)

paper2figure.description: Extract or generate figures from a paper: architecture diagrams, roadmaps, experiment plots.

paper2drawio.description: Convert PDF, text, or a screenshot of a diagram into draw.io XML (editable).

paper2poster.description: Generate an academic-style poster (PPTX or PNG) from a PDF paper.

paper2video.description: Generate a video script and TTS audio assets from a PPTX or PDF.

paper2rebuttal.description: Draft a structured rebuttal from reviewer comments + the original paper.

paper_content.description: Raw text or PDF path of the paper

review_content.description: Raw text of the reviewer comments

health.description: Check if the Paper2Any server is running.
